edges.mechanism: SHB1 associates with MINI3 promoter in vivo (ChIP)
edges.evidence: SHB1 associates with both MINI3 and IKU2 promoters in vivo

edges.mechanism: SHB1 associates with IKU2 promoter in vivo (ChIP)
edges.evidence: SHB1 associates with IKU2 promoter; shb1-D enhanced expression of MINI3 and IKU2 10-fold

edges.mechanism: via IKU pathway activation
edges.evidence: SHB1 gain-of-function regulates endosperm proliferation and timing of cellularization

edges.mechanism: WRKY TF binds W-boxes in IKU2 promoter
edges.evidence: mutation in MINI3 completely blocked the expression of IKU2 in double mutants; W-box motifs in IKU2 promoter

edges.mechanism: VQ domain protein acts upstream of MINI3
edges.evidence: MINI3 expression was reduced in iku1-1 background

edges.mechanism: upstream regulator of IKU2 expression
edges.evidence: IKU2 expression decreased in iku1-1 mutant

edges.mechanism: IKU1 (VQ motif) protein interacts with WRKY10/MINI3
edges.evidence: IKU1 interacted with MINI3

edges.mechanism: LRR kinase drives endosperm nuclear proliferation; blocks premature cellularization
edges.evidence: iku mutations cause premature cellularization and reduce endosperm proliferation

edges.mechanism: WRKY10 TF
edges.evidence: mini3 mutants show precocious cellularization and reduced endosperm nuclei

edges.mechanism: WRKY10 binds W-boxes in CKX2 promoter
edges.evidence: direct binding of WRKY10 to the two W-boxes of the promoter of CKX2 is critical for the transcriptional activation

edges.mechanism: cytokinin oxidase/dehydrogenase degrades cytokinin
edges.evidence: the cytokinin oxidase CKX2 affects cytokinin signaling (degradation)

edges.mechanism: high CK in central cell limits endosperm growth
edges.evidence: cytokinin signaling is involved in the IKU pathway (high CK → reduced growth)

edges.mechanism: direct transcriptional activation via W-Box binding
edges.evidence: dual-luciferase and EMSA showed that WRKY10 protein could specifically bind to probe pmiR397a

edges.mechanism: microRNA-mediated target repression
edges.evidence: miR397a represses the expression of LAC2

edges.mechanism: laccase functions as negative regulator of seed size via lignin biosynthesis in seed coat
edges.evidence: LAC2 functions as a negative regulator of seed size

edges.mechanism: RAV1 binds CAACA motif in MINI3 promoter
edges.evidence: RAV1 directly binds CAACA motif in MINI3 promoter (ChIP ~2-fold enrichment)

edges.mechanism: RAV1 binds CACCTG motif in IKU2 promoter
edges.evidence: RAV1 directly binds CACCTG motif in IKU2 promoter

edges.mechanism: transcriptional repression
edges.evidence: RAV1 binds and represses ABI5 promoter

edges.mechanism: BR-activated TF represses RAV1
edges.evidence: BZR1 represses RAV1 transcription during early seed development

edges.mechanism: bHLH TF represses SHB1
edges.evidence: SHB1 suppressed in AIF2ox plants

edges.mechanism: bHLH TF represses IKU1
edges.evidence: IKU1 were suppressed in AIF2ox plants

edges.mechanism: bHLH TF represses MINI3
edges.evidence: MINI3 were suppressed in AIF2ox plants

edges.mechanism: H3K27me3 deposition represses CKX2
edges.evidence: H3K27me3 was mainly deposited over a region spanning the promoter to the first exon of CKX2; CKX2 ectopically overexpressed in FIEcos seedlings

edges.mechanism: core PRC2 subunit (WD40)
edges.evidence: FIE is a core component of the FIS-Polycomb group complex

edges.mechanism: PRC2 catalytic SET-domain subunit
edges.evidence: MEA is the catalytic SET-domain subunit of the FIS-PRC2 complex

edges.mechanism: PRC2 Su(z)12-like subunit
edges.evidence: FIS2 is the Su(z)12-like component of the FIS-PRC2 complex

edges.mechanism: PRC2 WD40 subunit - scaffold for MEA/FIE
edges.evidence: MSI1 is a component of the MEA/FIE Polycomb group complex

edges.mechanism: PRC2 represses precocious central cell division
edges.evidence: fis2 mutants produce autonomous endosperm; loss of PRC2 allows endosperm overproliferation

edges.mechanism: PRC2 silences endosperm genes maternally
edges.evidence: mea/medea mutants show autonomous endosperm development

edges.mechanism: PRC2 core subunit represses endosperm
edges.evidence: fie mutants show autonomous endosperm development

edges.mechanism: PRC2 subunit restricts endosperm
edges.evidence: msi1 produces autonomous endosperm and seed coat differentiation without fertilization

edges.mechanism: endosperm-derived signal enhances integument mitotic activity
edges.evidence: autonomous endosperm growth is responsible for the increased mitotic activity in the integuments in msi1 autonomous seeds

edges.mechanism: endosperm cavity volume drives final seed size
edges.evidence: major endosperm/seed growth phase is driven by expansion of coenocytic endosperm; seed size depends on space available for embryo expansion

edges.mechanism: retinoblastoma-related blocks G1/S transition
edges.evidence: rbr1 female gametophytes fail to arrest nuclear division after the third mitosis

edges.mechanism: DNA methylation silences maternal FIS2 in paternal allele
edges.evidence: paternal loss of MET1 enhances the expression of the PRC2 component FIS2

edges.mechanism: ethylene signaling limits endosperm proliferation via maternal effect
edges.evidence: maternal EIN2 expression in endosperm affects cellularization and seed size

perturbations.evidence_sentence: shb1 loss-of-function reduces seed size by ~15%
shb1-D mutation enhanced expression of MINI3 and IKU2 10-fold; seed size 1.5-1.7 fold increase
mini3-1 seed weight 11.8 mg/1000 vs WT 20.25 mg/1000
iku2-3 seed weight 10.08 mg/1000 vs WT 20.25 mg/1000
overexpression of IKU2 in Arabidopsis led to increase in seed size
mini3-1/iku2-3 seed weight 10.58 mg/1000
iku1-1 produces small seeds; MINI3 and IKU2 expression reduced
all three act in same pathway; triple mutant has severely reduced seed size
RAV1OE produces ~40% reduction in seed size; >45% malformed seeds
rav1 mutant seed phenotype similar to wild-type plant
wrky10/mini3 mutants are significantly smaller
lac2 mutants produce slightly larger seeds than WT
pFWA::LAC2 produces slightly reduced seeds vs WT
mini3 lac2 partially rescued larger than mini3 alone
SHB1/IKU1/MINI3 suppressed in AIF2ox plants; decreased seed number/size
aif2-1/aif4-1 increased seed number

perturbations.condition: mea/+ maternal (before abortion); enlarged seeds that eventually abort
perturbations.evidence_sentence: mea/+ produces autonomous/enlarged seeds before abortion
FIEcos plants produced seeds larger than WT
fis2 mutant autonomous endosperm; enlarged when viable
msi1 produces autonomous endosperm/enlarged seeds
cre1 ahk2 ahk3 produces seeds larger than WT
cre1 ahk2 ahk3 produces seeds larger than WT
